description: This pipeline handles the output of image processing. The main steps include saving results, finalizing output, and preparing for further use.

e8d5a281-bdd8-4489-874d-e4b7c81447ac.name: ij1-binary-dtwatershed2d
e8d5a281-bdd8-4489-874d-e4b7c81447ac.description: Applies an euclidean distance transform on binary images. Then applies a watershed algorithm.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

fbb186c0-4850-46bb-b5e2-ae803bf42421.name: ij1-binary-connected-component-labeling-3d
fbb186c0-4850-46bb-b5e2-ae803bf42421.description: Applies a connected components labeling on a mask. Each connected component is assigned a unique value in the output label image. If the image is non-binary, the connected components are generated per-input value. If 3D data is supplied, the connected components are extracted in 3D.
